extraction.one_line_summary: QUINTANA Nairo attacked 5km from summit of Col du Galibier, gained 1:45 on chasers instantly, took stage and moved into top 10 GC.
tactical_patterns: Movistar placed Verona/Amador in 40km break formation despite Quintana being 9.5 minutes down, enabling later mountain attack support.
Jumbo-Visma lit up Col d'Iseran from behind despite having Kruijswijk/Dumoulin in break, prioritizing selection over conserving leader energy.
BERNAL Egan attacked yellow jersey group alone testing rivals despite teammate Carapaz being ahead, INEOS probing GC weaknesses not stage hunting.
ALAPHILIPPE dropped 30 seconds on final Galibier hairpins but descended aggressively past Pinot/Thomas group, using technical skill for damage control.

rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: positive: gained 1:45 in seconds on elite climbers after years of underwhelming, signals peak form timing capability
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: positive: attacked yellow group despite teammate ahead, took 32s on Kruijswijk for white jersey showing GC aggression
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: negative: dropped on final Galibier hairpins losing 30s, recovered via descending but weakness now exposed for stage 19 summit finish
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: negative: unable to follow Bernal attack and dropped to third overall, INEOS leadership hierarchy clarifying under pressure
rider_signals.BARDET Romain: positive: held off GC group for second place solo, showed climbing form absent in recent Tours
